content: anyone else also experiencing this? I can write kernel::dbg!("foo") in rust/kernel/lib.rs and get no warning when compiling with make LLVM=1 CLIPPY=1...
The feature has not been very reliable -- if it is a different case, I would suggest e.g. adding it to that issue.
A re-check with the latest stable and nightly of the existing reproducers would be useful too, since it has been a while since I opened that one.

thanks for that pointer, that seems rather annoying... Wanted this for https://lore.kernel.org/rust-for-linux/010001958dfeb4c7-0ed042d2-613b-4023-bb91-0c64f8a84fc9-000000@email.amazonses.com/
but since the patch series introduces the warning before fixing the instances, I thought it would warn me, but no warning got emitted...
